title: Termination
doc_html:
§3718. Termination

            The provisions of this Chapter shall terminate and have no effect on and after July 1, 2028.

            Acts 2013, No. 351, §2; Acts 2018, No. 353, §1, eff. July 1, 2018.
doc_text:
§3718.  Termination
The provisions of this Chapter shall terminate and have no effect on and after July
1, 2028.
Acts 2013, No. 351, §2; Acts 2018, No. 353, §1, eff. July 1, 2018.
